# Águia Amazonas Turismo

> Private Amazon rainforest journeys from Manaus, personally guided by Antonio in collaboration with the local community. The website is available in English and Brazilian Portuguese.

## Start here

- [English homepage](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/): Overview of Águia Amazonas, featured journeys, tour finder, reviews and booking information.
- [Página inicial em português](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/pt/): Visão geral das experiências, busca de passeios, avaliações e informações para reservar.
- [Brazilian Amazon travel guide](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/brazilian-amazon-travel-guide/): Seasons, water levels, wildlife, family travel, safety, packing and arrival through Manaus.
- [Guia de viagem da Amazônia brasileira](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/pt/guia-de-viagem-amazonia-brasileira/): Estações, níveis dos rios, fauna, famílias, segurança, bagagem e chegada por Manaus.
- [Meet Antonio](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/about/): Antonio's background and approach to personally guided Amazon travel.
- [Conheça Antonio](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/pt/sobre/): A história de Antonio e sua forma de conduzir experiências na Amazônia.

## Amazon journeys

- [Full Day Amazon Experience](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/full-day-tour-from-manaus/): A complete day from Manaus with rainforest, river life and wildlife-focused activities.
- [Jardim Maravilha Escape](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/2-day-amazon-experience-at-jardim-maravilha-guesthouse/): A compact guesthouse and river experience.
- [Jardim Maravilha Discovery](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/3-days-2-nights-at-rio-preto-da-eva-lodge/): Three days of forest, waterways and local hospitality.
- [Deep Amazon Lodge Journey](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/4-days-3-nights-at-jardim-maravilha-lodge/): Four unhurried days of forest, river and community life.
- [Rio Negro Explorer Cruise](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/amazon-cruise-3-days-2-nights/): A three-day regional-boat journey on the Rio Negro.
- [Anavilhanas Expedition Cruise](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/amazon-cruise-4-days-3-nights/): A four-day journey into the Anavilhanas archipelago.
- [Amazon Survival Experience](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/amazon-jungle-survival-experience/): A private three- to five-day forest-skills and hammock-camping expedition.
- [Jaú National Park Safari](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/experiences/amazon-safari-6-to-8-days/): A remote six- to eight-day expedition into protected Amazon forest.

## Contact and booking

- [Plan directly with Antonio on WhatsApp](https://wa.me/5592994587173): Share travel dates, group size and interests to receive a suitable proposal.
- Email: atnguide@hotmail.com

## Additional resources

- [XML sitemap](https://www.aguiaamazonas.com.br/sitemap-index.xml): Index of all public pages.
- [Tripadvisor profile](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g303235-d7940404-Reviews-Aguia_Amazonas_Turismo_Day_Tours-Manaus_Amazon_River_State_of_Amazonas.html): Independent traveller reviews.
